# BP-37 positive: type-switch guard RHS writes the package global before the alias scope
lang: go
file: BP-37-type-switch-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

var counter int

func classify(value any) {
	switch counter := func() any {
		counter++
		return value
	}().(type) {
	case int:
		counter++
	}
}
